advisories.detail: thm:hetero-clt: depends on def:hetero-hajek-estimator (statement-uses) but never references \ref{obj:def:hetero-hajek-estimator}
thm:postdesign-wald: depends on def:hetero-hajek-estimator (statement-uses) but never references \ref{obj:def:hetero-hajek-estimator}

G_n [undefined] in ass:ass:bipartite-interference/def:def:graph-envelope/thm:convex-design/thm:hetero-clt — Add an anchored definitionv defining a bipartite experiment/graph G_n and ref it from every statement that uses G_n.

I_n [undefined] in ass:ass:independent-heterogeneous-bernoulli/ass:ass:positivity-floor/def:def:feasible-designs/thm:hetero-clt — Add an anchored definitionv defining I_n as the intervention-unit set and ref it from its uses.

O_n [undefined] in ass:ass:bipartite-interference/def:def:hajek-denominators/def:def:graph-envelope/thm:hetero-clt — Add an anchored definitionv defining O_n as the outcome-unit set and ref it from its uses.
m_n [undefined] in ass:ass:bipartite-interference/thm:convex-design/def:def:feasible-designs — Add an anchored definitionv declaring m_n=|I_n| and ref it from statements using m_n.

N_i(G_n) [undefined] in ass:ass:bipartite-interference/thm:heterogeneity-separation — Add an anchored definitionv for the outcome neighborhood N_i(G_n) and ref it from all exposure and degree statements.

h_k(G_n) [undefined] in def:surrogate-design/thm:dispersion-certificate-unbounded/thm:surrogate-certificate — Add an anchored definitionv giving the degree-surrogate weight h_k(G_n) and ref it from all surrogate and certificate statements.

s_k [undefined] in thm:dispersion-certificate-unbounded/thm:heterogeneity-separation — Add an anchored definitionv giving the dispersion-summary quantity s_k and ref it from both certificate statements.
